# Orgni

> Orgni is the business-context layer for AI-enabled execution. It learns a company's processes, rules, roles, documents, and exceptions so AI systems and tools can act on real business context — safely and with a full evidence trail.

Orgni turns scattered company knowledge — documents, tools, and decisions — into one live, structured operating model that both teams and AI systems can rely on. It is a single product, not a suite of separate tools. Built by Olyxee, a research and infrastructure company for operational intelligence.

## What Orgni does
- Reads your sources (documents, spreadsheets, notes, connected systems) and builds a live operating model of how your business works.
- Keeps that context current as the business changes, so knowledge does not leave when people do.
- Gives AI systems the business context they need to be genuinely useful inside a company.

## Capabilities
- Context: structure company knowledge into usable business context.
- Memory: capture decisions, changes, outcomes, and operating history.
- Operations: connect context to real processes, teams, and systems.
- Controls: define what intelligent systems can access, suggest, or act on.

## Who it is for
Finance, logistics, operations, and knowledge-heavy teams that need AI and internal tools to understand how their business actually runs.

## Key facts
- Free to start: the Developer plan is free forever, no credit card required.
- Your data stays private to your organization and is never used to train shared models.
- Built by Olyxee.
